name: Cyclopean Masterpiece
description:
When attacking, your Thorns are added to your physical damage.
Whenever an enemy damages you, gain 2 Thorns.

name: The Oldest Staff
description: Whenever your Mana Burst triggers, gain 20% Mana Burst.

name: Godslayer Dagger
description: Your attacks execute enemies under 25% of their life.

name: Divine Visage
description: Whenever you heal, remove a negative Status. If you don't suffer any, restore 1 additional health.

name: Cloud-stepping Boots
description: Your counterattacks always critically strike.

name: Sacred Chain
description: When entering an Event Area, upgrade a random level 1 item that you have equipped.

name: Black Lotus Petal
description: Whenever Poison stacks are applied to an enemy, the same amount of Wound stacks are also applied to it.

name: Forgotten Crown
description: When an enemy attacks you, apply Poison to it equal to your Poisonous.

name: Dragon Scales
description: You have an extra 5% Damage amplification for every Rage stack.

name: Sun and Moon Shield
description:
While you have Armor, you receive 25% less damage.
While you don't, you deal 25% more damage.

name: Orichalchum Breastplate
description: At the end of the round, gain armor equal to 10% of your base Armor.

name: Golden-Fleece Cape
description: After dodging an attack, all the damage you would receive that round is halved.

name: Seal of the Burden
description: Whenever an enemy breaks free of a Stun, apply 20 Weakness to it

name: Lead Boots
description: All damage received is reduced by 2. This effect increases by 2 at the end of the round.

name: Scepter of the Devil
description: When attacking an enemy that suffers from any negative Status, apply 3 additional stacks of each negative Status it is affected by.

name: Soul Devourer
description: Gain 100% Damage Amplification after killing the first enemy each combat.

name: Helm of Conquest
description: At the end of the round, lose 1 health and gain 20% Damage Amplification. Each time this effect triggers, health lost increases by 1 and Damage amplification gained increases by 20%.

name: Evershining Diamond
description: Your Luck is transformed to Damage Amplification

name: Quicksilver Pendant
description: The first equipped item of each set adds +1 to its Set bonus (excluding Mythic items).

name: Unbreakable Mirror
description: Whenever an enemy breaks one of your Barriers,  apply 20 Wound to it

name: Dancer's Treasure
description: The first time you critically strike each round, gain armor equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

name: Rainbow Jewels
description:
Whenever you enter an Area, trigger one of these effects (chosen randomly):
·Restore 20% of your health.
·Enemies lose 20% of their health.
·Gain 2 Barrier.
·Gain 20 Rage.
·Obtain a random Legendary item.

name: Soul Harvester
description: After killing an enemy, gain 1% Damage Amplification permanently.

name: Seven-League Boots
description: When attacking, gain 5% Swiftness. Swiftness over 100% has a chance to trigger again (repeat for 200%, 300%, etc.)

name: Fated Sword
description: Your attacks ignore Barriers and Thorns, can't miss and aren't affected by Weakness.

name: Warmage Hat
description: If your Magic Damage is greater than your Physical Damage, all your damage becomes Magic and you gain 50% Mana Burst. Otherwise, all your damage becomes Physical and you gain 50% Critical Chance and 10% Lifesteal.
